info.name: API - Negative Test Cases (PTIT Medical)
info.description: 📊 NEGATIVE TEST CASES - PTIT Medical API | 31 Tests | NEG-AUTH-001 ~ NEG-DOCTOR-003 | Input Validation, Auth/Authz, Business Logic, Security | Use TestIDs for trace mapping

item.name: Authentication - Negative Tests
item.description: 🔐 AUTHENTICATION NEGATIVE (14 Tests) | NEG-AUTH-001 ~ NEG-AUTH-014 | Empty fields, Wrong credentials, SQL Injection, Duplicate emails, Weak passwords

item.name: Login Member - Empty Email
item.description: NEG-AUTH-001 | LoginController.login() | Empty email field | Expected: HTTP 200, result=0, error msg contains 'email'
